# This file is automatically generated from cmake.toml - DO NOT EDIT
# See https://github.com/build-cpp/cmkr for more information

# Create a configure-time dependency on cmake.toml to improve IDE support
if(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS cmake.toml)
endif()

# Target: msgpack_spec
set(msgpack_spec_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	msgpack_spec.cpp
)

add_executable(msgpack_spec)

target_sources(msgpack_spec PRIVATE ${msgpack_spec_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${msgpack_spec_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(msgpack_spec PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(msgpack_spec PRIVATE
	"../include"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT msgpack_spec)
endif()

# Target: msgpack_rpc_spec
set(msgpack_rpc_spec_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	msgpack_rpc_spec.cpp
)

add_executable(msgpack_rpc_spec)

target_sources(msgpack_rpc_spec PRIVATE ${msgpack_rpc_spec_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${msgpack_rpc_spec_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(msgpack_rpc_spec PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(msgpack_rpc_spec PRIVATE
	"../include"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT msgpack_rpc_spec)
endif()

enable_testing()

add_test(
	NAME
		msgpack_spec
	CONFIGURATIONS
		Debug
		Release
		RelWithDebInfo
		MinSizeRelease
	WORKING_DIRECTORY
		"${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/"
	COMMAND
		"$<TARGET_FILE:msgpack_spec>"
)

add_test(
	NAME
		msgpack_rpc_spec
	CONFIGURATIONS
		Debug
		Release
		RelWithDebInfo
		MinSizeRelease
	WORKING_DIRECTORY
		"${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/"
	COMMAND
		"$<TARGET_FILE:msgpack_rpc_spec>"
)
